svg.text: ▸ Sends Firebase ID token on all requests
▸ HTTPS to Cloud Run public endpoint
▸ Verifies Firebase ID token on every request
▸ Pulls secrets from Secret Manager at runtime
▸ Connects to Cloud SQL via VPC Connector
▸ Uses Cloud Run Service Account for all IAM
▸ CI/CD via GitHub Actions → deploy on push
▸ Scales to zero · max instances configurable
all business logic · central compute unit
▸ No public IP · VPC only · AES-256 at rest
Flutter → Cloud Run (HTTPS · Firebase ID token) · Flutter → Firebase services (direct) · Cloud Run → AI Provider / Stripe (HTTPS + API key)
Cloud Run → Cloud SQL (VPC Connector · no public IP) · Cloud Run → Secret Manager (IAM role · internal) · TLS 1.2+ on all connections
